title: malaxis olivacea
intro: Malaxis olivacea, also known as the olive-mottled green orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Malaxis olivacea include its potential to treat coughs, colds, and fever, as well as its use as a natural remedy for sore throats and bronchitis. Malaxis olivacea can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or dried and used in herbal capsules or tinctures for its medicinal benefits.
